name: The West Coast Feed Fans
description: Every summer, the boys in the band support Water4 to bring safe water piped directly to families' homes across Africa. Every $350 completes a home connection. Join The West Coast Feed in reclaiming time, opportunity, and purpose for women and girls through safe water access!
